message:
feat(index): add fully-resident in-memory vector index with f16 quantization

Add InMemoryVectorIndex and InMemoryTwoTierIndex as heap-allocated
alternatives to the file-backed (mmap'd) FSVI indices. All vectors
are stored in a contiguous Vec<f16> in row-major order, eliminating
memory-map page faults for deterministic sub-millisecond search latency.

Key capabilities:
- from_vectors(): build from pre-computed f32 data with f16 quantization
- from_fsvi(): load existing file-backed index entirely into memory
- Brute-force cosine-similarity top-k with optional SearchFilter
- Configurable parallel/sequential scan with rayon
- InMemoryTwoTierIndex wraps fast + optional quality indices with the
  same search_fast()/quality_scores_for_hits() API as TwoTierIndex

Includes comprehensive tests: dimension/count validation, f16 precision
tolerance, filter correctness, parallel-vs-sequential consistency, and
two-tier quality scoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
